request: tu mere liye portfolio banaa de samjha or usko github pr daal dena or jb sab ho jaaye to mujhe mail krdena or dhuyan rakhna koi laptop wagera acces kre mere alawa to lock krdena
final_result: Sir, maine aapke portfolio project ko successfully build kiya hai aur usko GitHub par deploy kiya hai. Ab aapko ek email aayi hogi jismein portfolio project ki successful deployment ki confirmation hai. Portfolio project ke link ke liye aapko email check karna hoga. Portfolio project ke liye aapka link: https://github.com/SambhavMehra/Sambhav-Portfolio-main. Ab aapka laptop aur anya devices secure hain, kyonki maine aapke laptop aur anya devices par access control set kiya hai. Koi bhi dusra aapke laptop aur anya devices par access nahi kar sakta hai.
